articles.author: Patrick Smith, Selina Guevara
articles.title: Millions face tornado and storm warnings after homes destroyed in Midwest - NBC News
articles.description: Millions from the Midwest to the southern Plains were under some form of tornado warning on Wednesday after multiple apparent twisters caused extensive damage in Illinois and Indiana
articles.content:
Millions from the Midwest to the southern Plains were under some form of tornado warning on Wednesday after multiple apparent twisters caused extensive damage in Illinois and Indiana.
